title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
We at Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners are looking for an experienced Property Consultant based out of Dhanbad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners:
Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Market Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahindra Lifespace South Asia Partners!
